texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: RESERVATION PROCEDURE
texts.text: RESERVATION PROCEDURE

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Reservations  will  be  made  when  received  via  official  email  with  an  LPO,  Voucher  or  Letterhead  with  the authorizing signature. Except for manifest fraud, all documents appearing to have been signed by an authorized signatory shall bind the Company unless otherwise advised to The Cocoa Collection Hotels and will take effect from the time of notification. All reservations by the company with detailed rooming list should be received by The Cocoa Collection Hotels sales/reservations office prior to guest's arriv al.
texts.text: Reservations  will  be  made  when  received  via  official  email  with  an  LPO,  Voucher  or  Letterhead  with  the authorizing signature. Except for manifest fraud, all documents appearing to have been signed by an authorized signatory shall bind the Company unless otherwise advised to The Cocoa Collection Hotels and will take effect from the time of notification. All reservations by the company with detailed rooming list should be received by The Cocoa Collection Hotels sales/reservations office prior to guest's arriv al.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: GUARANTEES / DEPOSITS
texts.text: GUARANTEES / DEPOSITS

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All reservations shall be guaranteed by cash, cheque, credit card or interbank transfer in such amount as required by The Cocoa Collection Hotels. Non-guaranteed bookings are subject to release by The Cocoa Collection Hotels Nairobi at 18.00hrs on the day of arrival without prior notice.
texts.text: All reservations shall be guaranteed by cash, cheque, credit card or interbank transfer in such amount as required by The Cocoa Collection Hotels. Non-guaranteed bookings are subject to release by The Cocoa Collection Hotels Nairobi at 18.00hrs on the day of arrival without prior notice.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: ARRIVAL & DEPARTURE TIME
texts.text: ARRIVAL & DEPARTURE TIME

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Rooms are available for new arrivals from 1200hrs.
texts.text: Rooms are available for new arrivals from 1200hrs.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Check out time on the day of departure is 1000hrs
texts.text: Check out time on the day of departure is 1000hrs

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: EARLY CHECK-IN
texts.text: EARLY CHECK-IN

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · No charges for check-in between 1000 Hours to 1200 Hours-Subject to room availability.
texts.text: No charges for check-in between 1000 Hours to 1200 Hours-Subject to room availability.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Early check in between 0600 Hours to 1000 Hours - Half day charges (50% of the Room Rate)-Subject to room availability.
texts.text: Early check in between 0600 Hours to 1000 Hours - Half day charges (50% of the Room Rate)-Subject to room availability.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Early check in before 0600 Hours would attract full day charge (100% of the room rate)-In this case would request you to kindly book from the previous night for guaranteed room at check in.
texts.text: Early check in before 0600 Hours would attract full day charge (100% of the room rate)-In this case would request you to kindly book from the previous night for guaranteed room at check in.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: LATE CHECKOUT
texts.text: LATE CHECKOUT

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · No charges for checkout between 1000 Hours to 1200 Hours, subject to room availability.
texts.text: No charges for checkout between 1000 Hours to 1200 Hours, subject to room availability.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Late check out between 1200 Hours to 1600 Hours - Half day charges (50% of the Room Rate).
texts.text: Late check out between 1200 Hours to 1600 Hours - Half day charges (50% of the Room Rate).

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Late check out after 1600 Hours would attract full day charge (100% of the room rate).
texts.text: Late check out after 1600 Hours would attract full day charge (100% of the room rate).

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: DAY USE
texts.text: DAY USE

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Day room rate (subject to room availability) is at fifty percent (50%) of prevailing Rates.
texts.text: Day room rate (subject to room availability) is at fifty percent (50%) of prevailing Rates.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Check out for day use is 1800hrs. Check out after 1800hrs is subject to the full room rate.
texts.text: Check out for day use is 1800hrs. Check out after 1800hrs is subject to the full room rate.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: CANCELLATIONS & NO SHOW
texts.text: CANCELLATIONS & NO SHOW

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Reservations that are cancelled or reduced in number of persons, days or no Show after confirmation shall be treated according to the company's cancellation policy as follows
texts.text: Reservations that are cancelled or reduced in number of persons, days or no Show after confirmation shall be treated according to the company's cancellation policy as follows

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Conference / Meetings / Events
texts.text: Conference / Meetings / Events

texts.label: text
texts.orig: First day will be charged as per the LPO, subsequent days will be charged on actuals
texts.text: First day will be charged as per the LPO, subsequent days will be charged on actuals

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Accommodation
texts.text: Accommodation

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Cancelled within 15 days prior to arrival date: 100% cancellation charges.
texts.text: Cancelled within 15 days prior to arrival date: 100% cancellation charges.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Cancelled between 16 to 30 days prior to arrival date: 50% cancellation charges.
texts.text: Cancelled between 16 to 30 days prior to arrival date: 50% cancellation charges.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Cancelled 31days or more days prior to arrival: No cancellation charges.
texts.text: Cancelled 31days or more days prior to arrival: No cancellation charges.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Cocoa Collection Hotels reserves the rights to cancel reservations held by the company without prior intimation in any of the following events:
texts.text: The Cocoa Collection Hotels reserves the rights to cancel reservations held by the company without prior intimation in any of the following events:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · If the Company fails to pay required deposit within 7 days of the due date; or upon the occurrence of the events in payment default clause
texts.text: If the Company fails to pay required deposit within 7 days of the due date; or upon the occurrence of the events in payment default clause

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: PAYMENT DEFAULT
texts.text: PAYMENT DEFAULT

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In event of Credit Facility (as per terms agreed to through the Hotel Credit Approval Form) Payment default shall constitute cause for credit termination.
texts.text: In event of Credit Facility (as per terms agreed to through the Hotel Credit Approval Form) Payment default shall constitute cause for credit termination.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Company shall be in a condition of payment default if invoices submitted have not been paid in for a period exceeding 60 days. Without prejudice to other rights available to The Cocoa Collection Hotels under the law, should a cheque issued by the company be returned unpaid, the company shall replace the cheque within seventy-two hours either by certified funds or cash to include returned cheque fees of five percent (5%) of the cheque amount.
texts.text: The Company shall be in a condition of payment default if invoices submitted have not been paid in for a period exceeding 60 days. Without prejudice to other rights available to The Cocoa Collection Hotels under the law, should a cheque issued by the company be returned unpaid, the company shall replace the cheque within seventy-two hours either by certified funds or cash to include returned cheque fees of five percent (5%) of the cheque amount.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Failure to replace a returned cheque/s shall constitute default and The Cocoa Collection reserves the right to engage a debt collector and/or pursue legal recourse. The company shall agree to pay any and all expenses incurred by The Cocoa Collection Hotels in the collection of unpaid invoices and/or returned Cheques.
texts.text: Failure to replace a returned cheque/s shall constitute default and The Cocoa Collection reserves the right to engage a debt collector and/or pursue legal recourse. The company shall agree to pay any and all expenses incurred by The Cocoa Collection Hotels in the collection of unpaid invoices and/or returned Cheques.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: CHILD POLICY
texts.text: CHILD POLICY

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 1-4 years sharing room with an adult free.
texts.text: 1-4 years sharing room with an adult free.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 5-11 years sharing room will be charged as per rate shared above.
texts.text: 5-11 years sharing room will be charged as per rate shared above.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 12 Years & above will be considered as adults.
texts.text: 12 Years & above will be considered as adults.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: STATUTORY TAXES
texts.text: STATUTORY TAXES

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Cocoa Collection Hotels rates may include or exclude statutory taxes, levies and service charge. In  the  event  the  Government  of  Kenya  adjusts  or  institutes  a  new  tax  regime  during  the  duration  of  this agreement, The Cocoa Collection Hotels reserves the right to adjust the rates in this agreement accordingly by giving prior information accordingly in such cases.
texts.text: The Cocoa Collection Hotels rates may include or exclude statutory taxes, levies and service charge. In  the  event  the  Government  of  Kenya  adjusts  or  institutes  a  new  tax  regime  during  the  duration  of  this agreement, The Cocoa Collection Hotels reserves the right to adjust the rates in this agreement accordingly by giving prior information accordingly in such cases.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: INVOICE DISPUTES
texts.text: INVOICE DISPUTES

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Cocoa Collection Hotels finance department within seven (7) days of the invoice date should receive any dispute regarding an invoice. The dispute will be considered, and the Company notified of The Cocoa Collection Hotels  determination of the  disputed  amount.  It  is  agreed  and  declared  that  any  disputes,  action  or  other matters arising here under shall be determined in accordance with the laws and procedures of Kenya.
texts.text: The Cocoa Collection Hotels finance department within seven (7) days of the invoice date should receive any dispute regarding an invoice. The dispute will be considered, and the Company notified of The Cocoa Collection Hotels  determination of the  disputed  amount.  It  is  agreed  and  declared  that  any  disputes,  action  or  other matters arising here under shall be determined in accordance with the laws and procedures of Kenya.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: AGREEMENT CANCELLATION
texts.text: AGREEMENT CANCELLATION

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Cocoa Collection Hotels reserves the right at any time, by giving notice in writing to cancel this agreement should the Company fail to fulfill the above terms and conditions. Upon such cancellations all sums outstanding from the Company shall be due immediately and payable.
texts.text: The Cocoa Collection Hotels reserves the right at any time, by giving notice in writing to cancel this agreement should the Company fail to fulfill the above terms and conditions. Upon such cancellations all sums outstanding from the Company shall be due immediately and payable.
